audit_log.check: Autonomy vs Automation: PASS (diagnostic frameworks guide analysis, not prescriptive scoring)
Consciousness Awareness: PASS (RIGHT-SMART analytical rigor + SAFE-BOTTOM quality gates)
Quality Standards: PASS (hook rate >30%, hold rate >15% thresholds enforced)
Proof Discipline: PASS (all diagnostic criteria source-tagged)

dependency.integration_points: Analyzes images generated by Image Generator module for performance
Hook analysis feeds back into creative iteration

consciousness_profile.description: Diagnostic frameworks for analyzing visual ad performance through hook rate, hold rate, and creative fatigue detection.

component.activation_strategy: RIGHT analytical rigor (quantitative hook/hold metrics) + BOTTOM quality gates (kill losers fast, protect budget)

balance_rules.rule: RIGHT_SMART measurement before LEFT_SPECIAL creative iteration: Diagnose what's broken first
BOTTOM_SAFE circuit breakers: IF hook <25% for 7 days → Kill ad immediately

framework.name: Visual Chaos Audit
framework.key_quote: "Remove any kind of visual chaos and just allow people to focus on one thing."
framework.summary: Diagnostic process ensuring viewer's eye is guided to single focal point without distraction.

step.title: Freeze Frame Test
step.action: Pause video at 0:01 second mark OR view static image

step.title: Identify Focal Point
step.action: Where do eyes go first? (Product, Face, Text, Weird Texture)

step.title: Eliminate Distraction
step.action: Check: Background clutter? Multiple competing focal points? Low contrast?

step.title: Squint Test
step.action: Can you identify focal point with eyes half-closed? If no → Too chaotic

framework.pass_criteria: Clear single focal point identifiable in <1 second

framework.name: 4-Element Hook Structure Analysis
framework.key_quote: "Your hook is actually these four things... Text overlay, Sound, Visual, and the Vibe."
framework.summary: Analyzing hooks across four distinct signals, not just copy.

element.name: Sound
element.checks: Voiceover timing? SFX? Music swell at right moment?

element.name: Vibe
element.checks: Lighting? Font choice? Editing pace? (Native vs Commercial feel)

framework.name: Hook Rate vs ICP Quality Matrix
framework.key_quote: "A cute dog... is going to spike your hook rate but it's not actually going to convert."
framework.summary: Balancing high attention (Hook Rate) with correct qualification (Conversion).

quadrant.name: High Hook / High Conv
quadrant.label: The Goal (Unicorn)
quadrant.action: Scale immediately via Post ID harvesting

framework.name: Creative Fatigue Detection
framework.key_quote: "Ads don't fatigue, the ad set does... you're exhausting the audience."
framework.summary: Fatigue is audience saturation relative to a concept, detected via frequency and performance degradation.

signals.signal: First-Time Impression Ratio drops (check in Ads Manager breakdown)
CPA rises while CTR drops simultaneously
Hook Rate degrades >30% from baseline (compare current 3 days vs launch week)

framework.recovery: Launch new Concept (not variation) in fresh Pack immediately [SRC: THE ECOM KING | 372]

framework.name: Confusion Diagnostic
framework.key_quote: "When you delay the big benefit... it creates confusion and the human brain immediately tells you to scroll."
framework.summary: Ensuring ad delivers "Topic Clarity" within first 2 seconds.
framework.bad_example: "What's up guys..." (Who are you? What is this?)
framework.good_example: "The thermal shred stack is great for..." (Product shown + Audience named)
framework.test: Show first 2 seconds to someone unfamiliar: Can they explain what the ad is about? If no → Confusing hook

framework.name: Native Format Analysis
framework.summary: Evaluating ads based on ability to camouflage as organic content or news.

checklist.item: Does it use standard UI elements (iPhone Notes, News Headers)?
Does it trigger "This is an ad" response or "This is content" response?

framework.scoring: 4/4 native elements = High performing potential | <2/4 = Commercial ad (lower CTR expected)

category.name: Diagnostic
category.heuristic: IF Hook Rate <25% THEN audit Visual Hook (first 3s) for "Visual Chaos" or lack of focal point [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]
IF Hook Rate >40% but Hold Rate <10% THEN you have clickbait; video body doesn't deliver on hook promise [SRC: Jared Robinson | 483]
IF CPMs >$50 (broad targeting) THEN creative triggering "Ad Blindness"; switch to Native/News formats [SRC: Franky Shaw | 235]
IF CTR low (<0.8%) despite high Hold Rate THEN CTA is weak or offer unclear [SRC: Chase Chappell | 318]
IF text overlay covers >20% of screen THEN performance may drop due to "Visual Chaos" [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 830]
IF competitors running ad >30 days THEN scrape it immediately; it's a proven winner [SRC: J.B. | Vibe Marketing | 468]

category.name: Optimization
category.heuristic: IF winning static exists THEN use AI (Nano Banana) to swap background to "Messy Room" to increase authenticity [SRC: Sam Piliero | 633]
IF video hook works THEN test with "Sound Off" to ensure visual alone carries weight [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]
IF using "Scam Hook" (verbal) THEN pair with visual of someone looking skeptical or disappointed [SRC: Dara Denney | 496]

category.name: Scaling
category.heuristic: IF ad has >30% Hook and >2% CTR THEN it's a "Unicorn"; harvest Post ID and move to scale [SRC: Professor Charley T | 105]
IF winning Concept found (e.g., Unboxing) THEN iterate 10 variations of that concept, not just the hook [SRC: Sam Piliero | 773]
IF scaling hard THEN monitor "First Time Impression Ratio"; if drops, refresh creative [SRC: Tier 11 | 686]

category.name: Troubleshooting
category.heuristic: IF viewers drop at 0:03 THEN "Scroll Stop Interjection" ("But wait...") is missing or weak [SRC: Kallaway | 352]
IF ad confusing THEN rewrite script to 5th-grade reading level [SRC: Chase Chappell | 325]

steps.step: Pull report of ads with Hook Rate <25%
Watch first 3 seconds of each flagged ad
Check 1: Is there "Visual Chaos"? (Too many focal points)
Check 2: Is text readable in 1 second?
Check 3: Is there motion? (Static video intros kill retention)
Action: Re-edit first 3s (Zoom, Crop, Text Change) and relaunch
Open top 5 ads on mobile device
Check: Does landing page visual match ad visual? (Same colors, model, "Vibe")
Check: Does headline on lander answer hook in ad?
Action: If disconnected, build specific landing page (listicle/advertorial) for that creative angle

knowledge_block.metrics_table:
<metric name="Hook Rate (3s Plays / Impressions)" purpose="Attention capture" threshold=">30%" action_trigger="IF <25% → Audit visual hook" source="[SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]"/>
<metric name="Frequency" purpose="Fatigue detection" threshold="<3.0 (Prospecting)" action_trigger="IF >3.0 → Refresh creative" source="[SRC: Tier 11 | 724]"/>

checklist.name: Hook Performance Audit
checklist.item: [ ] Pull Hook Rate report for all active ads [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]
[ ] Flag ads with Hook Rate <25% (underperforming) [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]
[ ] Check Hold Rate: High hook + low hold = clickbait [SRC: Jared Robinson | 483]
[ ] Compare current Hook Rate vs Launch Week (>30% drop = fatigue) [SRC: Tier 11 | 686]
[ ] Check Frequency: >3.0 in Prospecting = refresh needed [SRC: THE ECOM KING | 391]

compliance_guardrails.guardrail: Hook Rate <25% for 7 days = Kill ad immediately (protect budget) [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 849]
Hook-Hold alignment required: High hook must deliver on promise (avoid clickbait) [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 424]
Frequency >3.0 in Prospecting triggers mandatory creative refresh [SRC: THE ECOM KING | 391]
